subcodes.title: Words spoken on 1916-01-10
subcodes.first_line: At the time when they purposed to remove the Blessed Beauty from Baghdad, Namiq Pasha drafted a missive [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: وقتی که جمال مبارک را میخواستند از بغداد حرکت دهند نامق پاشا صورت امر
subcodes.subjects: @Declaration of Baha'u'llah, @banishment to; life in Constantinople, @rebellion and misdeeds of Mirza Yahya; the Azalis, @rejection, opposition and persecution
